message.content:
@startuml
actor Client
participant "Service1" as Service1
participant "Service2" as Service2

note right of Service1: SessionFactory\none per node
note right of Service2: Session\none per request

frame "model check" {
    Client -> Service1: register(Class<Pojo>)
    activate Service1
    Service1 -> Service1: checkModel
    Service1 -> Service1: createModelForPojo
    
    alt [mode="create"]
        alt [model exists]
            Service1 <- - Service1: throw exception
        else
            Service1 -> Service1: createModelInDB
        end
    else [mode="drop-create"]
        Service1 -> Service1: dropModelInDB
        Service1 -> Service1: createModelInDB
    else [mode="update"]
        Service1 -> Service1: getModelDeltaInDB
        Service1 -> Service1: updateModelInDB
    else [mode="none"]
        Service1 -> Service1: checkModelInDB
        alt [model differs]
            Service1 <- - Service1: throw exception
        end
    end
    deactivate Service1
}

Client -> Service2: store(pojo)
activate Service2
Service2 -> Service2: getDelta(pojo)
deactivate Service2

@enduml
